title: Shared care of child or agreed percentage

rows: Work out your total eligible education expenses
Multiply A by your agreed percentage
Calculate the maximum tax offset amount for this child
How many days in the year were your eligible?
Multiply D by your shared care and agreed percentage
Work out the maximum tax offset amount for this child ( C × E ) divided by 365 - round to two decimal places Repeat Steps 3 to 6 for each child
Add the amounts from F for each child
Include excess eligible expenses carried forward from the previous year
Multiply your expenses from I by 50%
Use the lower of G or J Write the amount at K on your tax claim

content_text:
Label | Step | Directions
A | 1 | Work out your total eligible education expenses
B | 2 | Multiply A by your agreed percentage
C | 3 | Calculate the maximum tax offset amount for this child
D | 4 | How many days in the year were your eligible?
E | 5 | Multiply D by your shared care and agreed percentage
F | 6 | Work out the maximum tax offset amount for this child ( C × E ) divided by 365 - round to two decimal places Repeat Steps 3 to 6 for each child
G | 7 | Add the amounts from F for each child
H | 8 | Include excess eligible expenses carried forward from the previous year
I | 9 | Add B and H
J | 10 | Multiply your expenses from I by 50%
K | 11 | Use the lower of G or J Write the amount at K on your tax claim
